title: rubus thyrsoideus var. montanus
intro: Rubus thyrsoideus var. montanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or mountain dewberry, is a variety of bramble native to the Himalayan region. This shrub is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsoideus var. montanus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, fever, and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
